name: Primal Rage
additional_info: Grants a Talent tool that can only be used when you are under 50% health. While buffed, your hits will showcase the health percentage of your opponent. Additionally, gain a 25% damage buff for the duration of the effect. 3 minute cooldown.
desc: If you are below 50%, unleash your rage and increase the amount of damage you deal for 25 seconds as well as being able to see enemy health when you hit them.
